# CRE8 Studio

> Professional recording studio in Cannock, Staffordshire, UK. Music recording, podcast production and content creation — from first take to final master, all in one place.

## About

CRE8 Studio is run by Dan Richardson, a producer and musician with 20+ years of industry experience. His productions have amassed over 1 million streams across major platforms and have received multiple features on BBC Radio 1 and BBC Introducing. Dan has shared stages with Enter Shikari and Royal Blood.

Everything at CRE8 Studio is handled by one person, on site — recording, mixing, mastering and video — so there are no hand-offs and no compromises.

## Services

- **Music Recording & Production** — Solo artists, bands, demos, EPs and full albums. Professional recording, mixing and mastering. WAV/MP3 exports.
- **Podcast Production** — Audio and video podcast recording. Multi-camera setup, professional microphones, on-site editing. Walk out with a finished episode and social clips.
- **Content Creation** — Video content, social reels and branded audio/visual production.

## Pricing

- Hourly (basic, audio only): £45/hr
- Hourly (professional, multi-track or audio+video): £75/hr
- Half Day (4 hours): £250
- Full Day (8 hours): £450

## Location & Contact

- Address: CRE8 Studio, Cannock Road, Cannock, Staffordshire, WS11 5DD, UK
- Phone: 07472 367935
- Email: info@cre8-studio.net
- Website: https://cre8-studio.net
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/cre8_cannock
